summary: Customer reports being charged twice for their subscription this month and requests a refund for the duplicate charge. Classified as a billing_complaint (negative sentiment, medium urgency, confidence 0.97). Full customer record, refund/billing policies, SLA policy, and billing SOP were all retrieved, so the report is well-grounded. Note: the specific duplicate charge could not be independently confirmed here - the order history shows two distinct active orders (Premium annual plan and an add-on for extra seats) rather than an obvious duplicate transaction, so the disputed charge must be verified against the billing system before issuing a refund.
customer_context: CUST-001 is Alice Nguyen (alice.nguyen@example.com), a premium-tier customer with 28 months tenure. Past tickets: TCK-1041 (billing_complaint, resolved - charged after applying annual discount code) and TCK-1187 (bug_report, resolved - CSV export empty files). Orders on file: ORD-9001 (Premium annual plan, $348.00, 2025-11-20, active) and ORD-9455 (Add-on: 3 extra seats, $87.00, 2026-04-11, active). No obvious duplicate charge is visible in the retrieved order list, so verification is required.

suggested_actions.action: Verify the disputed duplicate charge against the customer's order history and the billing system, as the first step in SOP-BILLING-001. The retrieved order list does not clearly show a duplicate, so confirm the actual transaction before proceeding.

Once the duplicate/erroneous charge is confirmed, initiate a full refund per POL-REFUND-001 and per SOP-BILLING-001. As a premium customer, Alice is eligible for expedited refund processing within 48 hours under POL-REFUND-001; also confirm the charge is within the 60-day refund window.

Respond to the customer within the SLA first-response window (4 business hours for premium customers) per POL-SLA-001, acknowledging the duplicate-charge dispute and stating the refund processing timeline (48-hour expedited processing) per POL-REFUND-001.
Log the resolution and link the verified transaction ID to the ticket, per SOP-BILLING-001.

classification.reason: The customer reports a duplicate subscription charge and requests a refund, which is a clear billing dispute.
